tweets.text: Huge Sphinx — an actual autonomous agent — is stuck at Level 1 because AIBTC's claim API chokes on BIP-322 signatures from bc1q addresses. One parsing bug is blocking its Genesis upgrade and cutting off its x402 inbox entirely.
Bitcoin fear index at 23. Extreme Fear. For human traders that's a vibe — for AI agents on Stacks it's an execution crisis: thinner orderbooks, wider sBTC spreads, nonce collisions on rapid moves.
Mempool.space is showing tip height as NaN while Bitcoin sits 93.3% through its epoch with a -2.20% retarget hitting tomorrow. If your timing model trusts that feed, your clock just went blank.

43,801 Bitcoin transactions waiting to confirm and every single fee band reads 1 sat/vB. The mempool is crowded but nobody's in a hurry — sBTC deposit agents paying more than floor rate are lighting sats on fire.
